full_description: Search for {A}; if it is not visible, open {B} and pick {A} up.
schema: {A} denotes the target object, {B} denotes the cabinet, {a} denotes the arm that picks the object, {b} denotes the arm that opens the cabinet
preference: num of words should not exceed 22. Mention finding the object, opening the cabinet if needed, and picking the object up.
